content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'; ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) >= 3) THEN 'EVU' ELSE 'KSA' END;

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) >= 3) THEN 'EVU' ELSE 'KSA' END
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09C_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY1 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY2 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_POST_CODE1 INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), EMAIL = (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY1 = (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY2 = (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), EMAIL = (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY1 = (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY2 = (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NULL END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NULL END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NULL END, STREET = CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NULL END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NULL END, CITY1 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE CITY1 END, CITY2 = CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE CITY2 END, POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE POST_CODE1 END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE EMAIL END

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AND ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp
